extraction_notes: Graph compiled from analyst memo preserving parent-child offering hierarchies (YouTube children, Pixel Device children, Gemini Family children, GCP children) and split-franchise structure for Gemini cross-cutting offerings. Other Bets technically represents non-Google businesses per memo but included as segment node for structural completeness. Content providers omitted as customer type due to absence from canonical label set. No external partners named in memo.
